description: Creates a Pinia Colada query wrapper with a matching starter unit test.

fields.label: Query name
fields.description: Used for the folder name, composable name, query key name, returned data name, and test name.

validation.message: Use lowercase kebab-case for query name.

fields.label: Endpoint
fields.description: The API endpoint passed to the request helper.
fields.hint: Enter the endpoint without a leading slash, e.g. `users` or `account/profile`.

validation.message: Use a valid API endpoint path without a leading slash.

fields.label: ID parameter name
fields.description: The JavaScript variable name used for the item ID in details queries.

validation.message: Use a camelCase JavaScript variable name.

variants.label: List
variants.description: Retrieve a list from an endpoint.

variants.label: Details
variants.description: Retrieve the details of a single item by ID.
